summary: Media manager and website settings project with persistent image storage
architectural_notes: Must maintain foundation structure from Phase 1 and 2
Only modify Phase 1/2 foundation if needed to complete missing structure
known_issues: Media manager shows only icons instead of actual image thumbnails
Website settings images appear saved but disappear when returning to menu
Homepage images not updating with saved changes

existing_features.title: Replace generic car icon thumbnails in Media Manager with actual image thumbnails. In the MediaAssetGrid component (frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAssetGrid.tsx), fetch and display the actual uploaded images using their blob IDs instead of showing placeholder icons.

Implement proper image URL generation for media assets. Create a utility function that generates blob URLs from asset IDs using the canister's HTTP endpoint pattern, and integrate it into MediaAssetGrid to display thumbnails.

new_feature_requests.summary: Display actual image thumbnails in media manager instead of icons
Display actual saved images in website settings and persist all field data permanently
